word: G2504 - κἀγώ - kagṓ - kag-o' - And I

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Conjunction / இணைப்புச்சொல்
and I, I also; I as well

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: So also the dative (second form) and accusative (third form); from G2532 and G1473; and (or also, even, etc.) I, (to) me: - (and, even, even so, so) I (also, in like wise), both me, me also.
